sn38.11:1.1:
1
"Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘flood, flood.’ What now is a flood?"
sn38.11:1.2: "There are, friend, these four floods: the flood of sensuality, the flood of existence, the flood of views, the flood of ignorance. These are the four floods."
sn38.11:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the abandonment of these four floods?"
sn38.11:2.1: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
